name: archflow-studio
description: Traceable architectural automation for CAD, SketchUp, official-source research, and design review. Official website: https://archflow.best

interface.shortDescription: Connect CAD and SketchUp to a sourced design workflow.
interface.longDescription: Configure supported local design tools, inspect CAD evidence, research official regulations, build a semantic model, generate reviewable CAD and SketchUp artifacts, and compare immutable design runs. Official website: https://archflow.best
defaultPrompt: Inspect my CAD and SketchUp setup and show a safe configuration plan.
Research official project constraints and create a traceable design model.
Generate and compare reviewable CAD and SketchUp design runs.
